Module 2 - Mastering Your Application



     1. What You’re Coaching: 



Mastery (through having them “reflect” on what’s resonating / giving confidence) 

Momentum (time / energy invested in answering q’s) 

Magnetism (through the “transparency alerts”) 

     2.	High-Level Overview: 



The Million Dollar Bet:  If you had to place a million dollar bet of customer success - based solely on the info you’re getting from the app (without getting on a call) - what would you ask to know you’re making a safe bet.



Err on the side of length: Don’t hold back on vital q’s out of fear “people won’t take the time”. The 15-30 mins they take here is their first major investment with you -- and the start of the coaching relationship. Great prospects feel best when they feel they put everything on the table. 



You’re going for fewer / higher quality: There’ no excuse for pumping low quality volume unless you have a team of sales people hell-bent on twisting poor fits into weak yes’s. 



Great q’s give you great starting points: Ask questions that will yield answers you can build immediate connection around: (ie. this really stood out to me… want to honor you for that)... vs. cheap rapport building (where you from / how’s the weather). 





     3. 15-Point AFA Format: 



Am I in the right place? (Calling out your segments with specificity) 

Recency Snapshot as it related to goal/problem 

Connecting to Power / Resourcefulness 

What they’d like to achieve (with you / your program)

The problems they’re experiencing (that they want fixed)

Mastery: What gives them confidence you (specifically) can help

Mastery: What gives them confidence in your unique process / method

Qualification / EE1: GIve them a chance to feel good and exclusively empowered

Qualification / EE2

Qualification / EE3

Ethos (for magnetism) 

Any remaining “friction q’s” 

TA1 - To create ease / safety about the sales call 

TA2 - Your own boundaries (to see if they’re a match for it)

TA3 - Price range Transparency (for mutual confidence) 





    4. Example: Automated Intimacy v2.0





Automated Intimacy™ is a next-gen sales and marketing program for high-integrity coaches, consultants, course creators (and the fine marketers who work with them)



Are you ready to apply for an invite?







What’s the best way to describe your awesomeness: 



I’m a badass service provider (copywriter, automation specialist, design, etc.) looking to level up my skills, differentiate from the crowd, and add high-profit productized services to my stack.



I’m an experienced coach, consultant or course creator actively marketing my programs to my audience (via email, facebook group, social, etc.) 



I might be a new-er coach / consultant / course-creator… but I want to set up the most robust marketing and automation foundation possible that will set me up for scale when I’m ready.  





Give me a taste of what the last 60 days have looked like in your life and biz?



What’s the most exciting / expansive step you’ve taken in your business over the last month or two? 



What are the most vital, heart-pounding biz and life achievements you’d like to whiskey or kombucha-clink to with us in the next few months?



What do you currently perceive as your biggest missed opportunities, leakages, or inefficiencies in your marketing or sales process? 



What gives you a sense of confidence that we may be able to help? 



What resonates most about the concept of Automated Intimacy? 



On a scale of 1-10 how confident are you in your (or your team’s) copywriting abilities?



On a scale of 1-10 how confident are you in your (or your team’s) tech / automation abilities? 



Do you have a team supporting you in copy / automation / page builds… or are you rocking these tasks solo for now? 



Do you believe that taking the time to explore the nuances of ethical marketing and sales strategies is a solid use of time? (Y/N)



Do you currently use ActiveCampaign (or if not, would you be open to migrating)?







Transparency Alert #1:



Your call will be with either Ry or Phil (aka the cofounders of Auto

mated Intimacy). We’re not “hired gun” sales people or “closers”. But we’re damn good at knowing if A/I will be a right fit for you (cuz… well… we created it).



Is that cool?



Yes / No 



Transparency Alert #2:



We do best with self-sufficient entrepreneurs and business owners who don’t have some urgent “life or death” problem that they need us to save them from. Yes, solving problems is cool (and something we’re great at). But helping you scale up, seize new opps, and get from great to effin’epic is where we love to play. 



					   With us on that? 



					          Yes / No 



Transparency Alert #3:



The investment for Automated Intimacy ranges from 4-15k depending on the level of 1-on-1 support would most serve you at this stage. 



If you’re a solid fit, with a clear path to an ROI, are you empowered to make the time / energy / financial investments WITHOUT stomach-clenching fear, max’ing out your credit cards, or sacrificing your enjoyment of spa days, shiatsu massages, and organic grass-fed steak?  



Yes / No 











Module 3 - Mastering Your Confirmation Page

What You’re Coaching:



Magnetism (via your confirmation video + next steps) - Section 1

Mastery (via testimonials / case studies) - Section 3

Momentum (via pre-call actions or program access) - Section 2



3 Main Sections



Section 1: Confirmation Video + Next Steps

Section 2: Pre-Call Actions / Momentum Builders

Section 3: Testimonials / Case Studies



Example (Automated Intimacy v2.0)





Boom! 



Your Automated Intimacy™ Exploratory Session is on the Books





<VIDEO>						Step 1: Check Your Inbox

							

You’ll get the confirmation email + call 

deets to put into your cal



Step 2: Review the 7 Pillars Guide



It’s the fastest way to get briefed on 

what A/I is all about - and what it can do 

for your biz. 



Step 3: Get a Head Start in A/I 



So that if things are in a fit, you can hit the ground running. 







Unlocked: Your Journey Inside Automated Intimacy Begins Right Now



We believe that your decision to join (or not) shouldn’t require a leap of faith -- but full knowledge and resonance with what the program will actually deliver. Here’s the full “uncut” first module of our core program:



<video thumbnails>









Some cool wins from our first round of Automated Intimacy





<Video 1>								      <Video 2>



<Written 1>						            	        <Written 2>





Example: Confirmation Video Script:



Hey Friend! Ry Schwartz here, just wanted to congratulate you on booking an Automated Intimacy exploration session.



I'm so grateful you took the time to answer those q's... and beyond excited to get to know you and your biz in the coming days.



Between now and then, I just have a few little asks:



1. Take a look at your inbox - you should see a confirmation email with all the details for showing up to our call. Plus a few extra little surprises. 



Next...



2. I'd love it if you can either review the 7 Pillars Guide that really goes over the finer points of what A/I is about. Or. if you've already done that... we've actually hooked you up with the first view videos of the core A/I program which  will give you the full taste of what you can expect if you decide to move forward... and of course help you hit the ground running. 



Beyond that, if you're anything like me, then you 'll prob appreciate actually knowing what you're getting into -- well - before you get into it.



3. Finally, Phil and myself really dedicate ourselves to these calls. We're not hired gun salespeple. We're the founders and coaches of the program who are in the best position to help you decide if it's the right fit. 



That said, we ask that you honor our time -- and your own -- by guarding the space on your calendar and showing up on time.  And if for whatever reason you have literally no choice but to cancel, please do us the solid of letting us know at least 24 hours in advance so that we don't sit around all sad in a lonely zoom room. 



Once again, super appreciate you being here and can't wait to connect over the next few days and help you decide if A/I is the right fit moving forward. 













Module 4 - Mastering Your Pre-Call Onboarding:



Core Asset 1: Your Confirmation Email





Subject:

vip deets about your A/I exploration call (+ program access)… 



Body:



So grateful of you takin’ the time to answer all those q’s.



We go pretty deep on those applications. 



But it’s only cos’ we care :) 



The good news is… you invested the time/energy to apply for your A/I exploration call…



And now we’re here.



Time for the awesomeness to officially begin.



Here are some VIP next steps I’d love for you to consider in advance of our call:



Defend our time-slot like a mama bear would defend her cubs: 



A good bet would be putting it on your cal. 



We go all-in on these calls. It’s not some “low-rank” hired gun salesperson takin’em. It’s us (as in, Phil and myself):



Why?



No one else on the planet is more qualified at this stage to help you decide if you’re primed to get a brag-worthy ROI inside Automated Intimacy. 



Please do us the solid of showing' up on time, and spare us the awkwardness of the good’ol “hey, you coming?” txt message that will recall our teenage-year trauma of being ghosted on small-town diner dates.





Get started inside Automated Intimacy right now:



If you’ve already gone through the 7 Pillars Guide, we invite you to get a head start in the actual A/I program.



We know you’re busy.



There’s no “mandatory homework” you need to show up on our call with.



But you do deserve the joy of getting a taste of exactly what you’ll be diving into if we decide to partner together inside A/I. 



So here’s a link that’ll take you straight into Module 1







That’s all we got!



We’re stoked to meet you (heck, we’re prob reading through your application right now over a cup of chai tea and some Trevor Hall movin’ through the headphones).



Catch you in a few,



Ry & Phil



Creators, Automated Intimacy





Optional Asset 1: The Enchanting First Encounter:



Goal: 



Send a personalized 45-60 second video message within 8 hours of the application. We’re doing this to: 



Build connection (and magnetism) before the call by stating why you’re genuinely excited to talk to them.

Defend against no-shows through a greater sense of accountability (anti-anonymity)

Reinforce next steps (momentum) 





Basic Format:



[Congratulate them on booking the call] 

[Repeat the exact time/date of the call]

[Remind them of any pre-homework / PONR] 

[Why you’re personally excited] 

[Accountability: If you can’t make it, let me know 24 hours in advance]
